title: alyssum aureum
intro: Alyssum aureum, also known as golden alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum aureum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Alyssum aureum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
